steps.title: Compare the ages
steps.content: Text 1 discusses species from clades predating Grande Terre's split from Gondwana around 80 million years ago. Text 2 says the oldest current clade crown age on the island is 41.1 million years, and nearly all current clades are much younger.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: A misuses the 2.0-million-year Goodeniaceae example as a recolonization date. B reverses the implication: if current clades are 41.1 million years old or younger, they cannot include species from 80 million years ago. D invents claims about descendants. The answer is C.
